metadata.title: contempArt embeddings: 16 image-embedding heads across 9 backbones
metadata.description:
Precomputed image embeddings for the contempArt dataset (441 contemporary German art students, 14,390 artworks). Ships 16 embedding heads across 9 backbones: CLIP (ViT-L/14, ViT-B/32), OpenCLIP (ViT-L/14, ViT-H/14 via KIM-C), DINOv2 (style via fruit-SALAD, gram, CLS, layer-12), CSD (style + content), SCFlow (style + content), GOYA (style + content), SD 2.1 VAE (KIM-A appearance), and SSCD (near-duplicate).

Each .npz is keyed by a filenames array plus one or more embedding arrays. All rows are aligned across files. See the README.md inside the record for full format, head table, and quickstart.

Derived from the original contempArt dataset (Huckle, Garcia & Nakashima, ECCV 2020 workshop). Analysis code and results: github.com/georgeblck/contempart-reanalysis.

License: CC-BY-NC 4.0, chosen conservatively because SSCD weights carry a non-commercial clause that propagates to derived features. Individual backbones are more permissive; see the record README for per-model licenses.
metadata.notes: Embeddings computed in fp16 on a single NVIDIA A6000 and stored as fp32 npz. Full reproducibility pipeline at https://github.com/georgeblck/contempart-reanalysis.
